#+title: Weekend Woodworking
#+description: Building a bookshelf from reclaimed oak
#+date: [2026-03-21 Sat]
:PROPERTIES:
:tags: post, woodworking, diy
:author: Xavier Brinon
:END:

* Materials

- 4 planks of reclaimed oak (200cm x 30cm)
- Wood glue
- 12 brass screws

* The build process

I started by *sanding* the planks to remove the old finish.
Then I /carefully/ measured and cut them to size.

Here is the ~cut-list.py~ script I used:

#+begin_src python
def cut_list(total_length, pieces):
    return [total_length / p for p in pieces]
#+end_src

#+begin_quote
Measure twice, cut once.
— Every woodworker ever
#+end_quote

** Assembly

The joints were secured with [[https://example.com/brass-screws][brass screws]].
